name: twisting yellow hallway
description: I'm in a twisting yellow hallway
hints: A yellow hallway. The yellow security door is to the north.
NORTH leads to the yellow room with a security door. UP returns to the main corridor.
Go NORTH to reach the yellow security door (needs maintenance or security-level ID). UP returns to the main corridor.
notes: Yellow hallway connecting the main corridor (U/room 3) and the yellow security door (N/room 10).
